title: Initialize Vinext app with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS in webapp/
description: npm create vinext@latest, App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind. Foundation for all other work.

title: Docker Compose: Neo4j 5 Community with Bolt+WS listeners
description: docker-compose.yml with Neo4j, WS listener on 7688, health check, volume for data persistence

title: Project structure: lib/neo4j, lib/graph, components, etl directories + .env.example
description: Create directory structure per TASKS.md, .env.example with NEO4J_URI/USER/PASSWORD

title: Neo4j schema initialization script with constraints and indexes
description: Cypher script: unique constraints on Politician.id, Legislation.expediente_id, LegislativeVote.acta_id; full-text indexes on name/title

title: Neo4j client wrapper: lib/neo4j/client.ts with typed query helpers
description: neo4j-driver-lite ESM, query() and queryGraph() methods, error handling, Workers-compatible

title: ESLint + Prettier configuration
description: Standard config for TypeScript React project

title: ETL types: Zod schemas for Como Voto legislators + votes JSON
description: Create src/etl/como-voto/types.ts with Zod schemas for legislators.json (compact), votaciones.json, and per-legislator detail. Also create transformer types for Neo4j node params.

title: ETL fetcher: download Como Voto JSON from GitHub
description: Create src/etl/como-voto/fetcher.ts — fetch legislators.json and votaciones.json from raw GitHub URLs. Validate with Zod schemas. Return typed data.

title: ETL transformer: map Como Voto to Neo4j params
description: Create src/etl/como-voto/transformer.ts — map legislators to Politician/Party/Province nodes, map votes to LegislativeVote nodes + CAST_VOTE relationships. Generate slugs, provenance fields.

title: ETL loader: batch MERGE into Neo4j
description: Create src/etl/como-voto/loader.ts — batch MERGE politicians, parties, provinces, votes, and relationships. Use parameterized Cypher, batched in chunks of 500.

title: ETL runner script: npm run etl:como-voto
description: Create scripts/etl-como-voto.ts CLI entry point. Orchestrate fetch → transform → load. Progress logging. Add npm script.

title: M2: Graph transform utilities — lib/graph/transform.ts to convert Neo4j records to {nodes, links} format

title: Create SearchBar component for graph explorer

title: Investigation CRUD API routes
description: POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/investigations, GET /api/investigations (list), GET /api/investigations/[slug] (detail). Auth-protected write ops, public read for published.

title: TipTap editor component with toolbar

title: Investigation create/edit pages

title: Investigations index + my investigations

title: Update seed-caso-libra.ts to use generic labels + caso_slug + prefixed IDs

title: Create seed-caso-finanzas-politicas.ts script

title: Update seed-caso-epstein.ts: prefix IDs with caso-epstein:, add caso_slug filters to MATCH clauses, use session pattern

Create src/lib/investigations/registry.ts — casoSlug → InvestigationClientConfig registry
Create investigations/registry.ts — client config registry mapping casoSlug to InvestigationClientConfig
description: Imports from each caso-*/config.ts. Exports getClientConfig(slug) and listClientConfigs(). AC: imports all 3 caso configs, returns correct config by slug, returns null for unknown slug.

title: Update /api/caso/[slug]/graph/route.ts — use generic query builder instead of hardcoded caso-epstein
description: Replace caso-epstein imports with getQueryBuilder().getGraph(slug). Validate slug with isKnownInvestigation(). AC: returns graph data for any valid caso_slug, 404 for unknown.

title: Create /api/caso/[slug]/timeline/route.ts — unified timeline endpoint
description: GET handler using getQueryBuilder().getTimeline(slug). Validate slug. AC: returns timeline items array, 404 for unknown caso.

title: Create /api/caso/[slug]/stats/route.ts — unified stats endpoint
description: GET handler using getQueryBuilder().getStats(slug). AC: returns {totalNodes, totalRelationships, nodeCountsByType}, 404 for unknown.

title: Create /api/caso/[slug]/config/route.ts — returns InvestigationClientConfig from registry
description: GET handler returning client config from registry.getClientConfig(slug). AC: returns full InvestigationClientConfig, 404 for unknown caso.

title: Create /api/caso/[slug]/schema/route.ts — unified schema endpoint
description: GET handler using getQueryBuilder().getSchema(slug). AC: returns {nodeTypes, relTypes}, 404 for unknown caso.

title: Create /api/caso/[slug]/node/[id]/route.ts — node connections endpoint
description: GET handler using getQueryBuilder().getNodeConnections(slug, id, depth). Accept ?depth=N query param (default 1, max 3). AC: returns GraphData centered on node, 404 for unknown caso.

title: Add 301 redirects from /api/caso-libra/* to /api/caso/caso-libra/*
description: Update existing /api/caso-libra/ route files to return 301 redirects pointing to the new unified /api/caso/caso-libra/ equivalents. AC: all old caso-libra API endpoints redirect with 301.

title: Implement stages/verify.ts — LLM-driven bronze verification
description: Query bronze-tier nodes, LLM cross-reference with tools, propose tier promotions to silver

title: Implement stages/enrich.ts — LLM entity extraction from source URLs
description: Query nodes with source_url but not yet enriched, batch by 5, LLM extracts entities via tool calls, proposes new nodes/edges. Follow verify.ts pattern.

title: Implement stages/analyze.ts — LLM-driven gap detection and hypothesis generation
description: Replace analyze.ts stub with full implementation: query silver/gold nodes, use getGraphSummary for context, LLM with analyze-stage tools (readGraph, runAlgorithm, proposeHypothesis, compareTimelines, proposeNode, proposeEdge), batch processing, error handling. Follow verify.ts/enrich.ts pattern.

description: In webapp/src/app/layout.tsx: (1) Import headers from next/headers, detectLang + SITE_META from lib/i18n, LanguageProvider from lib/language-context. (2) Replace static metadata export with async generateMetadata() that reads Accept-Language header via headers(), calls detectLang(), returns SITE_META[lang]. (3) Wrap body content in LanguageProvider (no defaultLang prop — let browser detection handle it). (4) Typecheck must pass after changes.
